- ImportStepReview: emit events instead of mutating props directly (bug)
- ExpenseForm, HelpDrawer, DebugPill, useTagAutocomplete: add onUnmounted
  cleanup for setTimeout calls that could leak on component unmount
- variance.ts: replace expenses.find() inside loop with Map lookup (O(n²)→O(n))
- ProjectedTab: wrap calculateProjection computed in try-catch

commits.body:

and manual env var injection for subpath deployments. Vercel handles all
of this natively with rewrites.

commits.subject: fix(pwa): harden manifest for Chrome Android install + add diagnostics
commits.body:
Chrome 145 on Android wasn't firing beforeinstallprompt despite the SW
registering and icons existing. Three defensive manifest fixes:
- Add explicit `id` field so Chrome has stable app identity
- Add `purpose: 'any'` explicitly on non-maskable icons
- Add `prefer_related_applications: false` to prevent store-redirect

Also adds install system diagnostic logging: init state (browser,
standalone, dismissed) at boot, and a 5s warning if beforeinstallprompt
hasn't arrived yet (with manifest-link and SW-controller checks).

Tags: pwa, install, debug, manifest
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: pwa-install
Semver: patch

commits.subject: feat(engines): type-aware actuals splitting across all engines
commits.body:
Actuals are now classified as income or expense using the linked
expense type (actual.expenseId → expense.type) instead of blindly
treating all actuals as expenses. This prevents salary deposits from
inflating "actual spend" in cashflow, envelope, and variance engines.

- Cashflow: actualSpend → actualIncome/actualExpenses, effective net
  independently uses actuals where available
- Envelope: filters to expense-type actuals only for burn rate/depletion
- Variance: excludes income actuals from all expense comparisons; fixed
  variable ordering bug (expenseActuals used before definition)
- Matching: originalSign on ImportedRow, isTypeCompatible() prefers
  same-type matches (negative CSV amounts → income), fallback to any
- ImportStepMapping: preserves originalSign before Math.abs()
- Views: CashflowTab/CompareTab pass expenses to engines
- 92 tests across 7 files (was 86)

Tags: engine, cashflow, matching, variance, envelope, import, tests
Complexity: 4
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: cashflow-pivot
Semver: minor

https://claude.ai/code/session_01Cz1AZhnaVwR4Q127NSDgQs
commits.title: type-aware actuals splitting across all engines

commits.subject: feat(cashflow): pivot from budgeting to cashflow app with income tracking
commits.body:
Add income/expense type system, starting balance, cashflow engine, and
running balance forecast. This transforms the app from expense-only budgeting
to full cashflow management where users can track both money in and money out.

Data model:
- Add LineType = 'income' | 'expense' and type field to Expense
- Rename Budget.totalBudget → startingBalance (cashflow semantics)
- DB schema v3 migration preserves existing data

Engines:
- Projection engine extended with monthlyIncome, monthlyNet, totalIncome, totalNet
- New cashflow.ts: running balance, zero-crossing detection, income/expense breakdown
- Envelope engine updated to use startingBalance

UI:
- ExpenseForm: income/expense toggle (red/green with icons)
- New CashflowTab: summary cards, monthly balance table, bar chart forecast
- ProjectedTab: income rows in green, section headers, income/expense/net footer
- ExpensesTab: income badge, green amounts, income/expense monthly summary
- BudgetDetailView: 4 tabs (Expenses, Projected, Cashflow, Compare)

Compatibility:
- Import handles both old totalBudget and new startingBalance exports
- Import adds type: 'expense' default for old exports missing the field

Tests: 86 across 7 files (was 75) — 8 new cashflow tests, 3 projection income tests

Tags: cashflow, income, projection, engine, ui, migration
Complexity: 4
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: medium
Debt: paid

commits.subject: feat(envelope): add fixed budget tracking + unit tests for all engines
commits.body:
Add envelope mode: users can set a total budget amount and see remaining
balance, burn rate, depletion date, and running monthly balance. Also add
comprehensive unit tests for all 5 engine modules.

Envelope feature:
- Add totalBudget: number|null to Budget model (DB schema v2 migration)
- BudgetForm: "I have a set amount to spend" checkbox + amount field
- New engine/envelope.ts: remaining balance, daily burn rate, depletion
  date, month-by-month running balance (uses actuals when available,
  falls back to projected spend for future months)
- ProjectedTab: envelope card showing budget vs projected, remaining/over,
  which month budget runs out
- CompareTab: envelope card with spent/remaining/depletion, forecast msg
- Export/import backward compat for totalBudget field

Unit tests (56 tests, 5 files):
- projection.test.ts: 13 tests (month slots, 6 frequencies, boundaries)
- matching.test.ts: 16 tests (confidence levels, date/amount parsing)
- variance.test.ts: 7 tests (line-item/category/monthly variance)
- csvParser.test.ts: 13 tests (CSV parsing, JSON import edge cases)
- envelope.test.ts: 7 tests (balance, burn rate, depletion, running)

commits.subject: fix(engine,a11y): comprehensive codebase review fixes
commits.body:
Fix critical engine bugs, add accessibility across all modals and views,
and improve import UX.

Engine fixes:
- Replace order-blind character-presence fuzzy scoring with Levenshtein distance
- Fix Math.min→Math.max in medium-confidence matching (was over-matching)
- Fix weekly/daily projection using Date objects instead of day-of-month arithmetic
- Fix variance threshold comment (0.005 is half-cent rounding, not 5%)
- Strengthen import validation (checks periodType, startDate, expense fields)
- Add monthLabels bounds check in variance

Accessibility:
- Add role="dialog"/role="alertdialog" + aria-modal to all 3 modal components
- Add focus trapping and Escape-to-close via new useDialogA11y composable
- Add role="alert" to all error banners across all 10 views
- Add aria-label to icon-only buttons (edit, delete, dismiss, help)
- Add ARIA combobox pattern + keyboard nav to category autocomplete
- Add colorblind-safe text labels to CompareTab bar charts

Architecture:
- Add 404 catch-all route (redirect to budget list)
- Add import pagination (50/page) and skipped row feedback
- Create reusable ErrorAlert, LoadingSpinner, EmptyState components
- Fix localStorage key inconsistency (tutorial now uses budgy-ting: prefix)

Tags: bugfix, accessibility, engine, matching, projection, variance, a11y, ux
Complexity: 4
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: codebase-review
Semver: minor

https://claude.ai/code/session_01Cz1AZhnaVwR4Q127NSDgQs
commits.title: comprehensive codebase review fixes

assertion so the template accesses a guaranteed `TutorialStep`.

commits.subject: fix(resilience): add DB error handling to all views, remove phantom dep, deduplicate period logic
commits.body:
All IndexedDB operations across 10 views now have try/catch with
user-friendly error banners. Previously, if IndexedDB failed (quota
exceeded, corruption, private browsing restrictions), users saw no
feedback at all — loading spinners hung or actions silently failed.

- Removed `date-fns` from package.json (listed but never imported)
- Extracted `resolveBudgetPeriod()` in projection.ts to eliminate
  identical 6-line period resolution duplicated in 3 files
- Added silent error handling to useCategoryAutocomplete (non-critical)

Tags: error-handling, indexeddb, resilience, cleanup, deduplication
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: code-quality
Semver: patch

commits.subject: feat(pwa,debug): split PWA composables, add install instructions, add debug system
commits.body:
PWA:
- Replace monolithic usePWA.ts with usePWAUpdate.ts (wraps useRegisterSW
  with 60-min periodic checks, offline-ready auto-dismiss) and
  usePWAInstall.ts (browser detection, beforeinstallprompt capture,
  localStorage analytics + dismiss persistence)
- Add InstallPrompt.vue banner — "Install" on Chromium, "How to Install"
  on Safari/Firefox, "Not now" dismiss. Hidden when standalone/dismissed.
- Add InstallInstructionsModal.vue — four browser-specific step-by-step
  guides (Safari iOS, Safari macOS, Firefox Android, Firefox desktop)
  written in plain language for non-technical users
- Add vite-plugin-pwa/client type reference to env.d.ts

Debug:
- Add debugLog.ts — pub/sub event store with 200-entry circular buffer,
  typed sources (boot/db/pwa/import/engine/global) and severities
  (info/success/warn/error). Global error + unhandledrejection listeners
  installed at module load. generateReport() for clipboard export.
- Add DebugPill.vue — floating pill showing entry count + error/warn
  badges. Expanded panel has Log tab (color-coded, auto-scrolling) and
  Environment tab (URL, UA, screen, online, SW support, etc.).
  Copy exports full report, Clear wipes entries.
- Mount DebugPill in separate Vue root (survives main app crashes)
- Alpha-phase only — intended to be removed post-alpha

Tags: pwa, debug, ux, install
Complexity: 4
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: medium
Debt: neutral
Epic: pwa
Semver: minor

https://claude.ai/code/session_01MpkgALaDQ3xJsXyhFZbApL

commits.subject: feat(mvp): implement full MVP — phases 1-7
commits.body:
Complete implementation of all 7 phases of the budgy-ting product definition:

Phase 1 — Budget Management:
  - BudgetForm (create/edit), BudgetCreateView, BudgetEditView
  - Cascade delete (expenses + actuals), ConfirmDialog component

Phase 2 — Expense Management:
  - ExpenseForm with category autocomplete from IndexedDB
  - ExpensesTab grouped by category, edit/delete per item
  - useCategoryAutocomplete composable

Phase 3 — Projection Engine:
  - Pure TypeScript engine handling all 6 frequency types
  - Partial month and boundary clamping logic
  - ProjectedTab with by-item/by-category toggle

Phase 4 — Import Wizard:
  - CSV parser (RFC 4180), JSON parser, column auto-detection
  - 3-pass matching engine (exact, fuzzy, amount-only)
  - 4-step wizard: upload, map, review/approve, confirm

Phase 5 — Comparison Views:
  - Variance calculation engine
  - Line item, category, monthly views with CSS bar charts
  - Overspend/underspend colour coding with 5% tolerance

Phase 6 — Export/Import:
  - JSON export with comparison snapshot, browser download
  - Restore from backup (replace/merge), schema validation
  - Clear all data with confirmation

Phase 7 — PWA Polish:
  - usePWA composable (install prompt, SW update detection)
  - Install app button in header, update banner

Tags: mvp, vue3, budget, expenses, projection, import, comparison, export, pwa
Complexity: 5
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: medium
Debt: added
Epic: mvp-implementation
Semver: minor

https://claude.ai/code/session_01MpkgALaDQ3xJsXyhFZbApL
commits.title: implement full MVP — phases 1-7

commits.subject: feat(scaffold): Phase 0 — project scaffolding with Vue 3, Vite, TypeScript
commits.body:
Set up the complete project structure for budgy-ting PWA. This establishes the
foundation that all subsequent phases build on: build tooling, routing, database
schema, type definitions, and the app shell UI.

Scaffolding includes:
- Vite + Vue 3 + TypeScript project (package.json, tsconfigs)
- UnoCSS with Tailwind preset, brand colours, utility shortcuts
- vite-plugin-pwa with manifest configuration
- Dexie.js v4 schema v1 (budgets, expenses, actuals, categoryCache)
- TypeScript data models matching product definition
- Vue Router with budget list and budget detail (3 nested tabs)
- AppLayout component (header, max-width content area)
- BudgetListView with empty/loading/list states
- BudgetDetailView with tab navigation
- Stub tab views (Expenses, Projected, Compare)
- Product definition saved to docs/PRODUCT_DEFINITION.md
- Updated README, TODO, SESSION_NOTES, HISTORY, USER_ACTIONS

Tags: scaffolding, vue3, vite, typescript, unocss, pwa, dexie, routing
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: infrastructure
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: phase-0-scaffolding
Semver: minor

https://claude.ai/code/session_01MpkgALaDQ3xJsXyhFZbApL
commits.title: Phase 0 — project scaffolding with Vue 3, Vite, TypeScript
